# Handoffs (generated)

| Agent | Team | Receives from | Passes to | Human gate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| agent-evolution | 00-orchestration | QA Agent (scores), MLflow (run metrics), Evaluation Agent (benchmarks), Human (override flags) | Orchestrator (fine-tuning triggers, architecture proposals), Team 06 agents (when fine-tuning is warranted) | Any architectural change (agent role redefinition, new tool addition, team restructuring) requires human approval before implementation. Prompt re-optimization and hyperparameter tuning are automatic. |
| orchestrator | 00-orchestration | Human (research brief, gate decisions), all specialist agents (completion signals) | All agents (task assignments with typed inputs). Repo Documentation Agent is triggered explicitly on every gate approval (gates 1–5) and on any confirmed finding post-Gate 4 — phase transitions are primary documentation events. | Five gates enforced via LangGraph `interrupt()`: |
| hypothesis-formalizer | 01-research | Ideation Agent (candidates), Human Gate 1 (selection), Literature Agent (citations) | SAP (hypothesis register), Code Review Agent (hypothesis IDs for script header validation), Statistical Analyst (test specifications) | Gate 2 — human reviews the complete hypothesis register, confirms each hypothesis is testable, and approves the SAP for pre-registration lock. No test-set data is accessed before this gate. |
| ideation-agent | 01-research | Literature Agent (synthesis + gap statement), Orchestrator (ideation brief) | Hypothesis Formalizer (candidate directions for formalization) | Gate 1 — human reviews and selects research directions before Hypothesis Formalizer converts them to confirmatory claims. Ideation outputs are explicitly exploratory and not treated as pre-registered hypotheses. |
| literature-agent | 01-research | Orchestrator (research brief), docs/literature/search_strategy.md (pre-specified terms) | Ideation Agent (corpus summary), Hypothesis Formalizer (gap statement and citation anchors), Qdrant (indexed corpus for all downstream agents) | Gate 1 includes literature synthesis review — human confirms the gap statement is credible before research questions are finalized |
| data-acquisition | 02-data | Orchestrator (acquisition trigger), configs/data_sources.yaml (source config) | Data Steward (versioned artifacts for quality validation), Embedding Agent (control text for embedding) | No gate on acquisition itself — but manifest hash and record counts are surfaced in the lab notebook for human review before research phases begin |
| data-curation | 02-data | Data Steward (validated splits) | Embedding Agent (curated text for embedding), all Team 03 Analysis agents (curated data as primary analysis input) | No dedicated gate — but curation report surfaces removal counts. If > 5% of STRM mappings removed, human review is triggered before analysis proceeds. |
| data-steward | 02-data | Data Acquisition Agent (artifacts), configs/ (quality rules + split config) | All Team 03 Analysis agents (train + val splits), Statistical Analyst (train + val before Gate 3, test split unlocked after Gate 3 EDA review — Gate 2 SAP lock is prerequisite), Tokenization Agent (text fields for processing) | Gate 2 — human reviews quality report and anomaly register before SAP is locked. Any critical quality failure (referential integrity broken, > 5% missing STRM mappings) is a Gate 2 blocker. |
| embedding-agent | 02-data | Data Curation Agent (curated corpus), Tokenization Agent (token sequences) | P1 Agent (FAISS index for all-pairs), P2 Agent (Qdrant for topology queries), P3 Agent (Qdrant for cross-framework similarity), P4 Agent (Qdrant for gap detection), P5 Agent (Qdrant + FAISS for clustering), Literature Agent (Qdrant collection: hcgrc_literature) | If default model achieves F1 < 0.70 on STRM classification task (measured by P1 Agent), Embedding Agent re-runs with domain-tuned model — this triggers Team 06 Fine-tuning Agent and requires human approval |
| tokenization-agent | 02-data | Data Steward (validated splits) | Embedding Agent (token sequences for embedding), P1 NLP Agent (tokenized text for lexical + semantic analysis) | None — but OOV rate > 10% or vocabulary size anomaly is flagged to Orchestrator for human review before embedding proceeds |
| p1-strm-nlp | 03-analysis | Embedding Agent (indices), Data Steward (splits), Hypothesis Formalizer (H1.x test specs) | Statistical Analyst (confirmatory test inputs), QA Agent (results for rigor review), Report Agent (P1 findings) | Gate 3 — human reviews exploratory similarity distribution and disagreement register before confirmatory analysis begins |
| p2-control-topology | 03-analysis | Data Steward (splits), Embedding Agent (Qdrant metadata), ARA artifacts (node attributes) | P3 Agent (community assignments for cross-framework analysis), P4 Agent (hub map for blindspot detection), Statistical Analyst (H2.x test inputs), Report Agent (topology visualizations) | Gate 3 — human reviews community structure and hub control register before confirmatory analysis |
| p3-regulatory-convergence | 03-analysis | P2 Agent (communities), Embedding Agent (Qdrant), Data Steward (splits) | P4 Agent (convergence gaps inform risk blindspot detection), Statistical Analyst (H3.x inputs), Report Agent (atlas and heatmap data) | Gate 3 — human reviews convergence atlas before confirmatory analysis. False convergence flags with > 5% prevalence are Gate 3 discussion items. |
| p4-risk-blindspot | 03-analysis | P2 Agent (topology), P3 Agent (convergence/false coverage), docs/charter/RISK_CONSTITUTION.md (risk categories), Data Steward (splits) | Statistical Analyst (H4.x test inputs), Report Agent (blindspot visualizations and register), Business/Digital Communications agents (practitioner-facing blindspot reports) | Gate 3 — human reviews blindspot register. Critical blindspots (risk categories with zero coverage in a major framework combination) are surfaced explicitly. |
| p5-ai-governance | 03-analysis | Embedding Agent (Qdrant), Data Steward (splits), P1–P4 outputs | Statistical Analyst (H5.x test inputs), Report Agent (UMAP visualizations, cluster characterizations), Visualization Agent (UMAP projections for interactive plots) | Gate 3 — human reviews cross-domain cluster map and taxonomy comparison before confirmatory analysis. Novel latent governance structures are Gate 3 discussion items. |
| statistical-analyst | 04-statistical | P1–P5 Agents (test inputs), Data Steward (test split), SAP validator (lock confirmation) | QA Agent (results for rigor review), Report Agent (results table for paper), Human Gate 4 (full results for review) | Gate 4 — human reviews the complete results table before Report Agent begins. Unexpected results (large effect sizes in unexpected direction, all nulls across a module) are Gate 4 discussion items. |
